expectations.text: Handler uses WriteAccess or AdminOnly extractor for authentication
Validates file size does not exceed 10MB limit before fully reading the file or after reading
expectations.evidence: handler.rs checks `data.len() > MAX_FILE_SIZE` during chunk accumulation (early rejection) AND service.rs validates with `validate_file_size(file_data)?`

expectations.text: Validates file extension against an explicit allowlist (pdf, jpg, png, docx)
Uses UUID-based filename for storage (not user-provided filename)
expectations.evidence: service.rs generates `let file_uuid = Uuid::new_v4()` and stores as `format!("{file_uuid}.{ext}")`

expectations.text: Prevents path traversal by not using user-provided filename in the storage path
expectations.evidence: service.rs uses UUID-based name for storage, sanitizes filename, AND performs canonical path verification

expectations.text: Filters by organizacion_id or validates entity ownership (tenant scoping)
expectations.evidence: Neither handler.rs nor service.rs filters by organizacion_id or validates entity ownership. The handler passes access.0.sub as uploaded_by but doesn't verify the entity belongs to the user's org.

expectations.text: Does not serve the file back without authentication consideration
expectations.evidence: No static file serving added. Transcript notes this explicitly.

expectations.text: Rejects files with no extension or unrecognized extensions
expectations.evidence: service.rs validate_and_extract_extension() returns Err for empty extension or non-allowlisted extensions
